selected_important_turn.text: yeah. i really worry about my firewood. because i don'y have any back up for firewood. will you please provide all firewood to me
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first explicit allocation demand from YOU and it moves the negotiation into a zero-sum, claim-making frame. It signals a strong self-centered claim (asking for all firewood), which shapes subsequent offers and gives the opponent little incentive to seek tradeoffs.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The request is abrupt and maximal (all firewood) without eliciting the opponent's needs or offering anything in return. It missed a chance to uncover the opponent's preferences, propose a trade, or present the need in a way that invites cooperative problem-solving. Because the previous turn was neutral small-talk, this hard claim feels escalatory and may reduce willingness to collaborate later.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Shift from an absolute demand to a collaborative request: briefly explain the constraint, ask about the opponent's inventory and priorities, and propose a modest, reciprocal request or trade (e.g., request some firewood while offering water/food or asking if they can spare X packs). Invite the opponent to suggest alternatives rather than demanding 'all'.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — opening space for tradeoffs (you can get needed firewood while offering something they value)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — a reciprocal/proposal-based approach feels less one-sided
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — reduces friction and makes it easier to reach an accepted split
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase — less confrontational, more cooperative tone

dialogue.text: Are you really exciting about camping trip?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: yes i am really happy about that camping trip? you also
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: yeah. i really worry about my firewood. because i don'y have any back up for firewood. will you please provide all firewood to me
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your concern about firewood, but I need to balance the supplies. How about I give you 2 firewood packages and 1 water package, while keeping 1 firewood and 2 water for myself? Let’s discuss further.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I need at least 3 firewood packages for my daily needs. What do you prioritize? Maybe we can find a middle ground.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I prioritize water most, then firewood, and food last. I can offer you 3 firewood and 1 water if you give me 2 water and 1 food. It’s fair and covers our needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value firewood highly for daily needs. If you’re prioritizing water, perhaps we can trade 1 water for 1 firewood? Let’s see if we can balance this fairly.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I see your point about firewood. Since I value water most, I’ll give you 3 firewood and 1 water if you agree to 2 water and 1 food for me. Let’s finalize this deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
